# SurviveJS

> SurviveJS is a JavaScript learning resource covering webpack, React, maintenance practices, interviews, research, workshops, and related web development topics.

## Main Sections

- [Home](https://survivejs.com/)
- [Books](https://survivejs.com/books/)
- [Webpack Book](https://survivejs.com/books/webpack/)
- [React Book](https://survivejs.com/books/react/)
- [Maintenance Book](https://survivejs.com/books/maintenance/)
- [Blog](https://survivejs.com/blog/)
- [Blog Topics](https://survivejs.com/blog/topics/)
- [Research](https://survivejs.com/research/)
- [Workshops](https://survivejs.com/workshops/)
- [Open Source](https://survivejs.com/open-source/)
- [Presentations](https://survivejs.com/presentations/)
- [Consulting](https://survivejs.com/consulting/)
- [About Juho Vepsalainen](https://survivejs.com/about-me/)

## Machine-Readable Resources

- [Sitemap](https://survivejs.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Atom Feed](https://survivejs.com/atom.xml)
- [Agent Skills](https://survivejs.com/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json)

## Notes For Agents

- Prefer canonical URLs without `index.html`.
- The books are long-form learning material; preserve surrounding chapter context when answering.
- The blog contains many interviews and historical posts, so include dates when recency matters.
- Site content is licensed separately from site source; check the license terms before reuse.
